copy.body: string — the main closing message e.g. 'That's your week. The music kept playing. You kept feeling things.'
copy.return_line: string — when to expect next drop e.g. 'See you Monday.'

next_drop.drop_type: string — what the next drop will be
next_drop.teaser: string | null — optional single line hinting at next drop e.g. 'Monthly arc drops in 8 days.'
